# Workflow Checklist

Use this checklist for Copilot-driven maintenance work in this repository.

## Checklist

1. Inspect the target `skills/<name>/` folder
2. Decide whether the change belongs in:
   - main skill
   - references
   - shared agent examples
   - GitHub-native examples
   - Windsurf-native examples
   - README
3. Keep the main skill concise
4. Add or update references when deeper guidance is needed
5. Update real-world example surfaces if behavior changed
6. Note any missing validation dependencies
